name: Kolonko
overview: Chaity and Rangan navigate the aftermath of an unsettling deception that shatters the veneer of their two-decade-long progressive marriage. While they try to restore their familial bliss, elements from the past and present intertwine to open a new can of worms!

trailers.title: Series Preview: Kolonko (কলঙ্ক) | Raima Sen | Ritwick Chakraborty | This Jan | hoichoi
